docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN DESIREE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN DESIREE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN DESIREE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,558.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DURAN DESIREE HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM AUG-26-1991 TO SEP-23-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-23-1991, DENIED
